category_sources: source_facts.description says Container Evolution Kit; official CEKit docs describe it as a container image creation tool.
display_name_sources: Official documentation uses CEKit as the project display name; source_facts.name is cekit.
docs_sources: Official CEKit documentation is hosted at docs.cekit.io; source_facts.homepage is the official site.
repo_sources: Official CEKit docs list issues and discussions at https://github.com/cekit/cekit.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says Container Evolution Kit; official docs say CEKit builds container images from YAML image definitions using builder engines.
